title: Craftable (Hostile) Spawners
description: a server-side option to making hostile mob eggs and spawners craftable
body:
This mod adds the ability to craft mob spawners and hostile mob spawn eggs

the earlier versions have the basic mobs like the zombie and creeper, while later versions have less basic, and often, more powerful mobs

this works fully on the server-side

i made this one on mcreator for a specific server idea, and I most likely won't update this mod or port it to other versions
